case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. COLLINS, KIMBERLY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLLINS, KIMBERLY $3,944.24 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,027.24
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, KIMBERLY
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, KIMBERLY
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, ORDER ORDER BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT JUDGMENT OF JUN-18-1996 SET ASIDE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, KIMBERLY
